title: We Must Be Deliberate to Maximise Benefits and Mitigate Risks of AI’ – Niyi Yusuf - FinancialEDGE
description: As artificial intelligence (AI) continue to rapidly transform the financial services sector, there is need to estanlish a robust AI framework that will provide a safeguards to customers. The Managing Partner of Verraki Africa Mr Niyi Yusuf disclosed on thursday at the fourth edition of Association of Corporate Affairs Managers of Banks (ACAMB) stakeholders conference
html: As artificial intelligence (AI) continue to rapidly transform the financial services sector, there is need to estanlish a robust AI framework that will provide a safeguards to customers.
